entries.notes: review session, sliding window, off-by-one in length tracking (p2-p1 vs p2-p1+1)
review session, Dutch National Flag, mid does not advance on 2-swap (unknown tail value)
review session, two-pointer from end, while(p2>=0) skips redundant nums1 copy
review session, running min + max diff, Kadane-family pattern
review session, three-reverse trick (reverse halves at pivot=n-k, then reverse whole), O(1) space
review session, hash map count+decrement, redundant has() check noted, int[26] better for ASCII
review session, single pointer common prefix + slice tail, array+join avoids O(n^2) concat
review session, digit-by-digit carry, while includes carry>0, fix: array push not += to dodge O(n^2)
review session, two-pass freq map, pass 2 should iterate s (not Map) to avoid insertion-order dependency
review session, s1+s1 contains s2 trick (any rotation), missing length-equality guard
review session, hash map count+scan, misses O(1) follow-up — TODO: Boyer-Moore Voting
review session, slow/fast two-pointer in-place dedup, p1 = boundary of kept region
review: sliding window, fixed >= condition + measure-before-shrink
review: single-pass min tracking, optimal O(n)/O(1)
review: Dutch flag one-pass, O(n)/O(1)
review: s1+s1 trick + length guard, O(n)
review: three-reversal in-place, O(n)/O(1)
review: freq map, O(n)/O(k), Unicode-safe
review: Dutch flag one-pass, low/mid/high invariants, no mid++ on 2-swap, O(n)/O(1)
review: two-pointer swap, p1=write boundary, stable since arr[p1] always 0 at swap, O(n)/O(1)
review: two-pointer overwrite, p1=write boundary, swap-from-end alt minimizes writes when val rare, O(n)/O(1)
review: single-pass largest+second, i<largest guard handles dupes of max, O(n)/O(1). Nit: -Infinity-1 sentinel === -Infinity, use -1 instead
review: iterative three-pointer (prev/curr/next), O(n)/O(1). Recursive alt is O(n) stack — worse at n=10^5
